title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Cancel
scenario: Verify login/logout flow in App Settings under General > Account, including successful login display, logout dialog, and cancel behavior.
steps: Start the app as a quest, tap the hamburger icon, go to General > Account, tap Log in, then Continue and log in with credentials.
expected: 1) "Your account" text is visible with Name and Email fields populated. 2) Login dialog opens with Cancel and Continue options. 3) Dialog disappears and user remains logged in.
